name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
        /\ decision = "none"

Prepare == /\ decision = "none"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"

VoteYes == /\ decision = "none"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"

VoteNo == /\ decision = "none"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"

Commit == /\ decision = "none"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
        /\ decision = "commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "none"
        /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
        /\ decision = "abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
      /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
          /\ count' = count + 1
          /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
      /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ count' = count - 1
          /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>
